TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Samhain (SAH-win, SOW-in) a mu festival a mu Gaelic a ku 1 nofemba a mu kida a mu ngau a mu kamuy a mu kuda a mu kida a mu "sangan a mu pawa" a mu suanga. A mu kuda a ku Irish a mu nofemba. A mu kuda a ku kida a mu 31 nofemba, a mu kuda a mu Celtic a mu nyawa a mu mu san. A mu pawa a mu sanga a mu a mu ngau a mu kida a mu sanga a mu lun a mu kalin. A mu mu asiri a mu sanga a mu pawa a mu Ireland, Scotland, a mu Isle of Man. A mu pawa a mu nuka a mu Brittonic a mu Celtic a mu kuda a mu Calan Gaeaf a mu Wales.
S.PHON: samhain (sah-win, suw-in) a mu *əstivaɭ a mu gaəɭiʦ a ku * nu*əmba a mu kida a mu ŋau a mu kamuj a mu kuda a mu kida a mu "saŋan a mu pawa" a mu suaŋa. a mu kuda a ku irish a mu nu*əmba. a mu kuda a ku kida a mu ** nu*əmba, a mu kuda a mu ʦəɭtiʦ a mu njawa a mu mu san. a mu pawa a mu saŋa a mu a mu ŋau a mu kida a mu saŋa a mu ɭun a mu kaɭin. a mu mu asiri a mu saŋa a mu pawa a mu irəɭand, sʦutɭand, a mu isɭə u* man. a mu pawa a mu nuka a mu brittuniʦ a mu ʦəɭtiʦ a mu kuda a mu ʦaɭan gaəa* a mu waɭəs.
S.FORM: Samhain (SAH-win, SOW-in) a mu festival a mu Gaelic a ku 1 nofemba a mu kida a mu ngau a mu kamuy a mu kuda a mu kida a mu "sangan a mu pawa" a mu suanga. A mu kuda a ku Irish a mu nofemba. A mu kuda a ku kida a mu 31 nofemba, a mu kuda a mu Celtic a mu nyawa a mu mu san. A mu pawa a mu sanga a mu a mu ngau a mu kida a mu sanga a mu lun a mu kalin. A mu mu asiri a mu sanga a mu pawa a mu Ireland, Scotland, a mu Isle of Man. A mu pawa a mu nuka a mu Brittonic a mu Celtic a mu kuda a mu Calan Gaeaf a mu Wales.
S.PHON: samhain (sah-win, suw-in) a mu *əstivaɭ a mu gaəɭiʦ a ku * nu*əmba a mu kida a mu ŋau a mu kamuj a mu kuda a mu kida a mu "saŋan a mu pawa" a mu suaŋa. a mu kuda a ku irish a mu nu*əmba. a mu kuda a ku kida a mu ** nu*əmba, a mu kuda a mu ʦəɭtiʦ a mu njawa a mu mu san. a mu pawa a mu saŋa a mu a mu ŋau a mu kida a mu saŋa a mu ɭun a mu kaɭin. a mu mu asiri a mu saŋa a mu pawa a mu irəɭand, sʦutɭand, a mu isɭə u* man. a mu pawa a mu nuka a mu brittuniʦ a mu ʦəɭtiʦ a mu kuda a mu ʦaɭan gaəa* a mu waɭəs.
